title: Codereview pass 1: DutyCycleTracker no protection against time going backwards
description: rust/lichen-core/src/duty_cycle.rs - If now_ms passed to any method is less than a previous call (clock rollback, wrap, or test error), behavior is undefined: records with future timestamps won't be evicted and budget calculations will be wrong. Consider either documenting this requirement prominently or adding a debug_assert!(now_ms >= self.last_now) guard.
